user_story: As a user, I want to be able to track my daily water intake so that I can ensure I am staying hydrated throughout the day. The app should allow me to set a daily goal for water intake and remind me to drink water at regular intervals. It should also provide visual feedback on my progress towards meeting my daily goal, such as a progress bar or a chart. Additionally, the app should sync with my fitness tracker to automatically log any water intake that is detected by the tracker.
true_user_story: The START NEW PROJECT function shall allow the user to create a new project.
